title: Tom's Bare Storage - Ressource Pack
description: Tom's Bare Storage is a Bare Bones compatibilty ressource pack for Tom's Simple Storage
body:
**Tom's Bare Storage** is a sleek and minimalist resource pack designed to perfectly complement the Tom's Simple Storage mod. Inspired by the clean and vibrant aesthetic of the Bare Bones resource pack, this add-on simplifies the textures of all storage-related blocks and items in the mod, ensuring a smooth and colorful experience while managing your inventory and storage systems.

With Tom's Bare Storage, every block and item in Tom's Simple Storage mod is redesigned to fit seamlessly into the Bare Bones style. The textures are stripped down to their essentials, using bold, flat colors and clear shapes, making your storage setups not only functional but also visually stunning.

## Key Features:
- Minimalist Design: All textures for storage blocks, cables, and interfaces are reimagined with a flat and vibrant look, ensuring a clutter-free visual experience.

- Consistency: Perfectly matches the style of the popular Bare Bones resource pack, making it a must-have for fans of a clean and simple Minecraft world.

- Enhanced Visibility: The simplified textures make it easier to identify different storage blocks and cables at a glance, improving your gameplay efficiency.


## Installation:

1. Download the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) Resource Pack.
2. Download [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage).
3. Add the Tom's Bare Storage resource pack to your resource packs folder.
4. Enjoy!


_Experience the simplicity of Tom's Simple Storage in a whole new way with Tom's Bare Storage!_
